title: [Epic] Plain-Text ASCII Admin Notifications
body: Introduces clean, concise plain-text ASCII templates for administrative alerts (auto-bans, registrations, offline notifications) to prevent strict corporate email/Slack parser blocks, while preserving rich HTML/UTF-8 emails for end users.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #1: Create Concise Plain-Text Notification Templates
issues.body: Create 5 new plain-text ASCII template files under pkg/server/templates/en/ for admin notifications.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #2: Integrate Plain-Text Template Rendering in server.go
issues.body: Implement renderNotificationTemplate using text/template in pkg/server/server.go and update SendAdminAlert calls to use them.
